series_metadata.series_description: Case files of Ohio EPA attorneys containing documents (e.g. enforcement referral requests, briefing memos, correspondence, calculations, draft orders, research materials) related to Ohio EPA administrative and judicial enforcement actions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If case results in issuance of administrative order by the Director, retain in operating area until appeals are exhausted or appeal periods have run, and order is complied with and/or terminated. Then transfer to off-site storage and retain for five years. Contact State Archives to determine whether records are of historical value. If so, transfer to State Archives. If not, destroy. If case results in referral to Attorney General, retain in operating area until case is concluded and appeals are exhausted or appeal periods have run and judgment entered is complied with. Then transfer to off-site storage and retain for five years. Contact State Archives to determine whether records are of historical value. If so, transfer to State Archives. If not, destroy., Paper: Shred
